question: propor melhoria para atendimento whatsapp
source_changes: Criar roteiro minimo de atendimento WhatsApp com respostas base.
Separar mensagens em: novo contato, aguardando confirmacao e resolvido.
Medir tempo de primeira resposta ou mensagens sem resposta por dia.
Rodar por 7 dias antes de promover mudanca para estado canonico.
sync_rule: Derived sync proposal only. No target branch state mutation.

candidates.reason: Sales may benefit from visibility into WhatsApp response quality and unresolved contacts.
candidates.proposed_signal: Expose response_time_minutes and unresolved_conversations as sales-facing operational indicators.
candidates.risk: Do not expose raw atendimento conversations or private customer data.

candidates.reason: Operations may depend on whether customer requests are being resolved or waiting for confirmation.
candidates.proposed_signal: Expose aggregate unresolved_conversations and without_resolved_status counts.
candidates.risk: Do not treat atendimento pilot metrics as operational SLA until promoted.

candidates.reason: Management should track whether the pilot is improving customer response flow before promotion.
candidates.risk: Management view must show pilot status, not permanent state.
